summary: NetBox infrastructure deployed to production — preflight hang fixed, token provisioning with 300s retry, ops/password credentials provisioned.

verification.observed: NetBox running, API token provisioned to OpenBao, verification tasks passing.
Preflight find task with follow:false prevents symlink traversal hang; converges in expected time.

notes: Root cause of token provisioning failure: endpoint required username/password in form-urlencoded body. Fixed after 8 iterative debug sessions.
